RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0038 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Aisha Khan Date of Birth: 12/05/2001 SSN (tokenized): TKN-845916 Annual Income: $127,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $24,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN69535AL Kia Corolla 2022 EV New 20,000 Authorized Signature: Aisha Khan
